name: bow-skills
description: An open marketplace of engineering skills for Claude Code. Install 'bow-core' for the project-agnostic spec→ship lifecycle (planning, TDD, review, security, performance, shipping, and more); add stack plugins like 'flutter-supabase' when they fit your project.

plugins.name: bow-core
plugins.description: Project-agnostic engineering skills across the full spec→ship lifecycle: spec, planning, TDD, debugging, review, simplification, security, performance, observability, shipping, docs, migration, CI/CD, API design, and the commit workflow. Includes review/security/test/perf subagents. Works on any codebase.

plugins.name: flutter
plugins.description: Generic Flutter/Dart best-practice skills — state management, navigation, performance, rendering, animations, testing, build flavors, CI/CD, platform channels, accessibility, and i18n. Framework-specific but project-agnostic; pairs with bow-core.

plugins.name: flutter-supabase
plugins.description: Optional stack conventions for Flutter + Supabase apps: generated data models, the BaseViewModel + MixinBasePage MVVM pattern, and a pre-commit Supabase security review. Layer on top of bow-core for Flutter/Supabase projects.
